definitions.text: To spread (a substance, especially one that colours or is dirty) across a surface by rubbing.
examples: The artist smeared paint over the canvas in broad strokes.

definitions.text: To cover (a surface with a layer of some substance) by rubbing.
examples: She smeared her lips with lipstick.
This detergent cleans windows without leaving smears.

definitions.text: A false or unsupported, malicious statement intended to injure a person's reputation.
A preparation to be examined under a microscope, made by spreading a thin layer of a substance (such as blood, bacterial culture) on a slide.
